name: io.github.do-droid/seoul-essentials
description: 22,000+ public facility data for foreign tourists in Seoul — restrooms, pharmacies, WiFi hotspots, AED locations, tourist info centers, and subway timetables.

tools.name: find_places
tools.description: Search for public facilities in Seoul by type and conditions

tools.name: get_place_detail
tools.description: Get full details of a specific place by its ID

tools.name: find_nearby
tools.description: Find facilities near GPS coordinates, sorted by distance

tools.name: get_subway_timetable
tools.description: Get Seoul subway timetable for a specific station
